title: Sensitive Information Disclosure in MongoClient logging channel in Splunk Enterprise
description: Sensitive Information Disclosure in MongoClient logging channel in Splunk Enterprise
solution:
Upgrade Splunk Enterprise to versions 10.2.1, 10.0.4, 9.4.9, 9.3.10, or higher.
Splunk is actively monitoring and patching Splunk Cloud Platform instances.
